package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_database_access_query_inside_loop_without_batching: Layer: Database access. Flag SQL queries issued inside loops where batching or IN queries can bound round trips.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule525PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario525Positive(records []Rule525PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
